purpose: Reproducible final training for selected models only; not exploration.

representatives.Graph: GCN (group CV selection; hyperparams baseline A per gcn_tuning_summary.json)

execution_principles: Local CV results remain the rationale for model selection; SageMaker runs do not re-tune for new champions.
SageMaker runs only the three representatives; no additional model search in this phase.
Same data joins, keys, and metric definitions as local experiments; document any URI changes.
Graph: GCN with drug-group CV policy; use hidden_dim=64, lr=1e-3, weight_decay=1e-5 unless team policy changes.

comparison_csv_columns.local_validation_type: Short label for local selection metrics (CV type).
comparison_csv_columns.sagemaker_validation_type: How SageMaker/final job reported metrics (e.g. row holdout vs full train).
comparison_csv_columns.sagemaker_evaluation_note: Do-not-compare caveats; e.g. GCN row split vs drug-group CV mean.

post_job_workflow: After each Training Job: aws s3 cp .../model.tar.gz locally, then sync_sagemaker_model_tar_to_final_three.py --family {xgb|residualmlp|gcn} --model-tar <path>

metrics_sidecar_schema.note: final_model_comparison.csv shows validation_type + evaluation_note beside SageMaker metrics. GCN: row holdout is not drug-group CV.
